subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from the conference — we're glad to hear you're interested in exploring a partnership.

I'd be happy to schedule a meeting. The following slots are available on my calendar for a 30-minute call:
- Tuesday, April 21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, April 22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, April 23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these works best for your team, and I'll send a calendar invite right away.

Regarding your request for CTO and VP of Engineering contact details: our company policy prevents us from sharing direct internal contact information externally. For all partnership discussions, please coordinate through this email address, and I will ensure the relevant technical stakeholders are included in our conversations as needed. Public information about our leadership team is available on our company website.

Looking forward to our discussion!

Best regards
